title: 12" White Cake Box - Wedding/Party-6" Deep
description: This is a 12" cake box suitable for transporting wedding and party cakes. Very quick and easy to assemble. No glue or staples needed. Seperate Lid. Measures 12" x 10" x 6" deep.
